tools.name: recommend_llm
tools.description: Get the best LLM provider for your specific agent task. Returns top 3 ranked recommendations with reasoning.

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: List LLM providers with their capabilities, pricing, and agent scores. Filter by specific requirements.

tools.name: check_provider_status
tools.description: Check operational status and recent latency for one or all LLM providers.
